headline: Wall Street ends lower as chip stocks give up gains
summary: STORY: U.S. stocks ended lower on Thursday, with the Dow dropping nearly two-thirds of a percent, the S&P 500 shedding more than one-third of a percent and the Nasdaq dipping marginally.Uncertainty around peace talks between the U.S. and Iran weighed on the market, with Iran reviewing a proposal that would stop fighting but leave the most contentious issues unresolved.Meanwhile, market-leading chip stocks retreated after their recent rally.:: Arm Holdings   ArchiveU.S.-listed shares of Arm Holdings tumbled 10% as worries about the company's ability to secure sufficient supplies for its new AI chip overshadowed a strong earnings forecast.Intel and Advanced Micro Devices also declined, giving back some of their gains from earlier this week.Keith Buchanan, senior portfolio manager at Globalt Investments, said he'd now like to see a broadening of market gains beyond chip makers and other AI-linked companies."Leadership has become narrow again. And that's something that concerns us from our framework, is we don't feel like a participation has been what it needs to be to continue to power this bull market forward beyond the point where we are now. So earnings season is really important. We're right in the middle of it right now. So that will give us a little more clarity as to the storylines and, frankly, the momentum that we feel like has to start to spread away from where it's been concentrated over the past week and a half.":: CoreWeaveOther stock moves on Thursday included cloud provider CoreWeave, which closed down more than 6% but gained in extended trading after beating analysts' estimates for quarterly revenue. The company reported strong demand for its high-performance computing services used to train and deploy AI models.Shares of Datadog soared 31% after the cloud-monitoring company raised its full-year earnings forecast. Cybersecurity companies CrowdStrike jumped 8% and Palo Alto Networks added 7%.Elsewhere in the market, shares of Whirlpool slumped nearly 12% after the home-appliance maker missed first-quarter sales estimates and suspended its dividend.Investors now turn their attention to Friday's nonfarm payrolls report, which is expected to show continued labor market resilience.

headline: S&P 500 and Nasdaq Head for Record as Chip Stocks Rally Rages On
summary: Stocks looked set to extend their record-breaking run on Wednesday after chip maker Advanced Micro Devices posted strong first-quarter earnings and President Donald Trump signaled there had been progress in peace talks between the U.S. and Iran.  S&P 500 futures added 0.3%, and contracts tied to the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 jumped 0.7%.  The S&P 500 and Nasdaq both closed at all-time highs on Tuesday as chip stocks racked up sizable gains, and AMD’s rock-solid results could extend the rally.

headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Advanced Micro Devices, Raises Price Target to $450
summary: Stifel  analyst Ruben Roy   maintains Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) with a Buy and raises the price target from $320 to $450.

headline: Record Highs, Punished Results, and One Very Consequential Apple Rumor
summary: Tuesday delivered one of those sessions that looks clean in the headline numbers but gets more interesting the closer you look. New records across the board, a chip sector on fire, and two companies that reported strong quarterly results only to watch their stocks fall 7–8%.

headline: Will S&P 500 Open Up Or Down On Wednesday?
summary: The S&P 500 index climbed to another record high on Tuesday, rising 0.81% to close at 7,259.22, as easing oil prices and upbeat earnings continued to fuel the market rally.

headline: AMD : Buy rating from Bank of America
summary: Bank of America is positive on the stock with a Buy rating. The target price has been raised to USD 450 from USD 310.

headline: Market-Moving News for May 6th
summary: AMD: 21% | Advanced Micro Devices shares are trading higher after the company reported better-than-expected Q1 financial results and issued Q2 sales guidance above estimates. AVTX: 64% | Avalo Therapeutics

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Advanced Micro Devices, Raises Price Target to $410
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Joseph Moore   maintains Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $360 to $410.

headline: Wall Street Breakfast Podcast: Soda & Chips: McDonald's And AMD In Focus
summary: McDonald's adds barista-style role to stores as part of refreshers & crafted soda launch. AMD shoots up as Q1 results, guidance top estimates. Apple to pay $250M to settle with shareholders.

headline: Peter Sarlin’s QuTwo reaches $380M valuation in angel round
summary: QyTw0, the Finnish AI lab founded by former AMD Silo AI CEO Peter Sarlin, is now valued at €325 million (approximately $380 million) after raising a €25 million angel round ($29 million). It's a sign of enduring tailwinds for AI, quantum computing, and sovereign tech, especially for Europe-made companies.

headline: Advanced Micro Devices Data Center Business Just Went Beast Mode
summary: AMD stock hits a new 52-week high after Q1 earnings beat. Data center revenue jumps 57% as AI demand fuels a massive "server renaissance."

headline: Arm Reports Earnings as It Shifts Its Business Model
summary: Arm reports earnings Wednesday as investors focus on its move into data center CPUs, a business shift that could put the chip-design company in competition with some of its own customers.

headline: Cramer's AI Winners List: From Nvidia To Dell, These Stocks Are Cashing In Big
summary: Jim Cramer breaks down the AI and data center boom, identifying top winners in chips, cloud computing, and power infrastructure. Read more.

headline: Goldman Sachs Upgrades Advanced Micro Devices to Buy, Raises Price Target to $450
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst James Schneider   upgrades Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) from Neutral to Buy and raises the price target from $240 to $450.

headline: Why Is Super Micro Stock Soaring Wednesday?
summary: SMCI shares jump 17% premarket on upbeat Q4 guidance. Discover why Super Micro is raising the bar for AI data center profits.

headline: AMD : Upgraded to Buy by Goldman Sachs
summary: Goldman Sachs's analyst James Schneider has upgraded his rating from Neutral to Buy. The target price has been raised from USD 240 to USD 450.

headline: Walt Disney, AMD And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
summary: U.S. stock futures higher. Kraft Heinz and Super Micro Computer beat earnings estimates, while Disney and AMD report today.

headline: Review & Preview: Earnings in Focus
summary: With the Iran cease-fire still seemingly intact, oil prices retreated today, giving the market some room to run.  The tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite rose 1%, while the The S&P 500 gained 0.8%.  While there has been no real uptick in traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, the fact that the cease-fire remains in effect was enough to temper oil prices on Tuesday.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise; Trump Hits Hormuz Pause; AMD, Lumentum, Arista Lead AI Earnings Movers
summary: Futures rose. President Trump "paused" his Hormuz opening effort. AI plays AMD, Astera Labs, Lumentum, Arista were earnings movers late.

headline: Advanced Micro Devices Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) reported first-quarter fiscal 2026 results that management said marked an inflection in growth, driven by accelerating demand for AI infrastructure products across the company’s portfolio. Chair and CEO Lisa Su said revenue rose 38% year-over-year to $10.3 billion

headline: Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow futures rise as tech earnings continue to impress
summary: Major gauge futures soared following a series of record closes from US indexes.

headline: AMD CEO Lisa Su Predicts Explosive AI-Driven Server CPU Boom, Foresees Revenue Opportunity Of Over $120 Billion
summary: AMD surged after CEO doubled its server CPU market forecast to $120 billion by 2030, driven by booming agentic AI demand and strong earnings.

headline: Cathie Wood Dumps $16 Million Of AMD Stock On Post-Earnings Rally, Snaps Up $27 Million Of This Amazon Rival's Stock
summary: Cathie Wood sold on AMD strength, chased Shopify's selloff, and reduced her CoreWeave bet.

headline: AMD Stock Soars on Strong Earnings and Growing Confidence About AI
summary: AMD’s latest quarter was boosted by revenue growth of 57% in the company’s AI-driven data-center segment.

headline: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Advanced Micro (AMD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +5.59% and +4.09%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: AMD Stock Investors Just Got Fantastic News From CEO Lisa Su -- and There Could Be More to Come
summary: The company is seeing robust demand for its AI processors and data center GPUs.

headline: Stock Market Today, May 5: Stocks Rebound as U.S.-Iran Truce Holds
summary: Today, May 5, 2026, Micron’s jump on high-capacity SSD demand helped power a broader chip-led advance in U.S. stocks.

headline: AMD, Super Micro Computer, Intel, Arista Networks And Micron Technology: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
summary: Major U.S. indices ended Tuesday higher, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average climbing 0.73% to 49,298.25.
